Edward April 1284 September 1327), also called Edward Caernarfon, King England from 1307 until deposed January 1327.
fourth Edward Edward became heir throne following death older brother Alphonso.
Beginning 1300, Edward accompanied father campaigns pacify Scotland, 1306 knighted grand ceremony Westminster Abbey.
Edward succeeded throne 1307, following father's death.
1308, married Isabella France, daughter powerful King Philip part long-running effort resolve tensions between English French crowns.
Edward close controversial relationship with Piers Gaveston, joined household 1300.
precise nature Edward Gaveston's relationship uncertain; they have been friends, lovers sworn brothers.
Gaveston's arrogance power Edward's favourite provoked discontent both among barons French royal family, Edward forced exile him.
Edward's cousin, Earl Lancaster, group barons seized executed Gaveston 1312, beginning several years armed confrontation.
English forces were pushed back Scotland, where Edward decisively defeated Robert Bruce Battle Bannockburn 1314.
Widespread famine followed, criticism King's reign mounted.
